name: Scallion Cakes #2
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Coarse-grain sea salt (or kosher salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the flour in a mixing bowl. Sprinkle evenly with the baking powder and sugar.
2. Mix with a wooden spoon.
3. Add water gradually, stirring and mixing with the wooden spoon.
4. Knead the dough for 3-4 minutes. Cover it with a damp cloth and leave for half an hour.
5. Knead again for 2-3 minutes after resting.
6. Divide the dough into ten portions and form into narrow strips (8-10 inches long).
7. Flatten each strip with a rolling pin to pancake thickness.
8. Sprinkle salt and chopped scallions on each band.
9. Roll the bands lengthwise into long double-thickness spaghetti-shaped strips.
10. Hold one end of the strip and turn the other end around in circles until concentric rings form around the center, creating a spiral pancake.
11. Flatten the pancake with the palm of your hand.
12. Repeat to make ten spiral pancakes.
13. Heat oil on the bottom of a large flat-bottomed frying pan until hot.
14. When the surface is evenly greased, place the spiral pancakes in the pan.
15. Fry over low heat for 2-1/2 to 3 minutes, then turn the pancakes over.
16. Repeat and gently fry until evenly browned on both sides.
